mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ARTICLE title like concat('%',#{title},'%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `ARTICLE` (title, cover, description, content, date) values (#{title}, #{cover}, #{description},#{content},#{date})
mapper.update: UPDATE `ARTICLE` set title = #{title}, cover = #{cover}, description = #{description}, content = #{content}, date = #{date} WHERE id = #{id}
